title: Tung Tung God
about: Tung Tung God refers to both a viral TikTok audio in which a child names "Tung Tung God" as a character from the Bible when asked, as well as a depiction of the Indonesian Brainrot character Tung Tung Tung Sahur as an angel or god with wings and a white body, holding a scepter instead of a baseball bat. The audio originates from a February 2026 video by YouTuber Blitzerz and went viral throughout March 2026, inspiring memes on sites like TikTok and X / Twitter .
origin:
On December 8th, 2025, TikToker [1] @bl1tzerz posted a video of Fortnite gameplay in which he asks a child to name five characters from the Bible. The first thing the child says is, "Tung Tung God." The post gained over 4.2 million views in three months.

On January 1st, 2026, TikToker [2] @lyudoed1 posted a slideshow that includes an image of Tung Tung Tung Sahur as an angel or god, depicting him in heaven with a white body, large wings and a scepter. The post gained over 288,000 views in two months.
